debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ AEMeasurable (fun ω => u \ X ω) P

proof:
by
    apply Measurable.comp_aemeasurable _ hX.aemeasurable
    refine MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable_comp_iff.1 ?_
    refine measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ ?_
    exact measurable_const.and (measurable_pi_iff.mp MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable i).not
successful_attempts:
by
    apply Measurable.comp_aemeasurable _ hX.aemeasurable
    refine MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable_comp_iff.1 ?_
    refine measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ ?_
    exact measurable_const.and (measurable_pi_iff.mp MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable i).not
